brief.objective: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
keyMessages: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The Pathways products page describes CARE Coaching as collaborative educator support with reflective and data-driven practices.
visualDirection: coach and school leader reviewing notes
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
Consulting, coaching, and continuous learning for your team
subheadOptions: CARE Coaching provides tailored professional development, workshops, program evaluations, and personalized coaching that help educators reflect on current practice.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
copy.body: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders. For district EL leaders, this draft focuses on customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support.
bullets: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
fittedCopy.deck: CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning tailored to multilingual learner support.
proofPoints: Customized professional learning helps educators reflect on current practices and implement research-based actions.
The CARE Coaching Needs Assessment guides leaders with action-based data for school improvement and professional development planning.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: large campaign headline with concise deck, exactly two evidence-oriented proof points, compact CTA, and restrained footer in a left-led editorial stack
designRecipe.artDirection: CARE Coaching campaign flyer concept for district EL leaders: warm, evidence-minded multilingual learner support shown through authentic educator coaching, collaborative planning, reflective practice, and inclusive classroom energy, with a polished right-field visual story flowing subtly into the lower proof rhythm.
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: Use negative space, soft gradients, light, depth, and subject placement to protect the left message area and lower CTA/proof rhythm; never draw boxes, cards, labels, or UI placeholders.
designRecipe.appComposition: App owns all real copy, official logo, CTA, footer, and export; ImageGen establishes the full 4:5 editorial split atmosphere, right-field story, and spatial hierarchy for app typesetting.
promptDirectives: Design the whole flyer concept, not a decorative background.
Keep a quiet left text field with a dynamic right-field education coaching scene.
Use crop, lighting, and depth to guide headline, proof, and CTA hierarchy without panels.
Depict diverse multilingual learning support and district-ready professional learning credibility.
No readable text, fake logos, contact bars, icons, blank cards, or placeholder modules.

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
issues: CARE Coaching copy includes sibling-brand term(s): CARE Coaching Needs Assessment, action-based data.
warnings: CARE Coaching prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.
CARE Coaching copy mixes brand terms by request: Needs Assessment.

imageResults.revisedPrompt:
Create a portrait full-bleed campaign art plate, 1024x1536, for a district-facing education coaching flyer. Editorial split composition: quiet, type-safe left message field with warm negative space and subtle texture; dynamic right-field visual storytelling with educators collaboratively planning multilingual learner support. No readable text anywhere.

Scene and style: authentic premium editorial photography / refined photorealistic campaign atmosphere, warm but polished, district-ready professional learning setting. On the right side, show a diverse small group of adult educators in an active coaching conversation: a coach and school/district leader reviewing notes and planning materials with another educator nearby, engaged and reflective. Include multilingual learner support cues only through non-readable materials: color-coded sticky notes, abstract handouts with blurred non-text marks, language-support planning artifacts, notebooks with no legible writing, classroom/professional learning environment hints. Avoid close-up faces and detailed hands; use natural mid-distance crop, depth of field, and light.

Composition: left 42–48% is protected negative space for app-owned headline/deck/proof/CTA, with soft gradient from pale warm cream to very light teal, enough contrast and calm texture. Right 52–58% contains richer visual energy: educators arranged diagonally with layered depth, bright window light, warm highlights, teal and green accents, subtle golden accents. Guide visual hierarchy for a large headline top-left, concise deck mid-left, exactly two compact proof points lower-left, compact CTA above restrained footer; do not create boxes or panels. Keep important subject energy away from edges and leave lower-left and lower-middle breathing room.

Brand palette influence: #0081A4 deep teal, #3EB3BD aqua, #5EA974 green, #F7D470 warm yellow, integrated naturally in clothing accents, folders, sticky notes, light, and background details. Mood: customized coaching, continuous professional learning, consulting, reflection, district leader support, multilingual learner support, practical and evidence-minded.

Strict exclusions: absolutely no readable text, no letters, numbers, labels, fake paragraphs, book titles, email/URL/phone, citations, lorem ipsum. No logos, wordmarks, initials, seals, badges, CTA buttons, icons with labels, charts, cards, document-layout panels, blank placeholder boxes, brochure scaffolding, fake UI, contact bars. No CARE logo, no Three Cs wording, no CCNA, no needs-assessment references, no action-based data/reporting copy, no chevrons, arrows, mountain marks, logo-like shapes, repeated patterns. Avoid generic stock workshop posing, empty washed-out fades, random book stacks, literal brand-shape wallpaper.

Output should feel like a complete high-end marketing artifact art plate with visual hierarchy and atmosphere, but text-free and logo-free, ready for app-composed official typography and assets.

request.goal: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
request.topic: customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support
request.notes: Highlight the Three Cs without drifting into sibling needs-assessment copy.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The WCEPS CARE Coaching program supports educators by focusing on the Three Cs: Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching Three Cs

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Our professional learning offerings are designed to help educators reflect on their current practices and implement research-based actions that lead to meaningful change.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching support model
